creator: thawatchai@gmail.com
text:
py-MySQLdb can be successfully compiled. However, when importing the module, it causes segmentation fault. See how to repeat the problem.

How-To-Repeat: [piyawat@u3 ~]$ python
Python 2.5.2 (r252:60911, Oct  1 2008, 17:14:49) 
[GCC 3.4.6 [FreeBSD] 20060305] on freebsd6
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
